forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.intro: Enter the email tied to your account and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.sent: If that email is registered, we just sent a reset link. Check your inbox.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.missingToken: Missing reset token. Please use the link from your email.
reset.success: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in…
reset.failure: Reset failed. Please request a new link.
